x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount is predefined and constant.

Comment:
Example: A scheduled transfer of €100 every month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer-Entered Amount Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount is specified by the sender at the time of the transfer.

Comment:
Example: User decides to send €250 to a friend.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage-Based Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount is calculated as a percentage of a base value.

Comment:
Example: 10% of account balance is transferred automatically to a savings account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee-Inclusive Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount includes service fees, charges, or taxes.

Comment:
Example: Sending €100 with a €2 fee, total debit from sender = €102.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee-Exclusive Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Fees are separate from the transfer amount, so the recipient receives the full intended amount.

Comment:
Example: Sender pays €100, and the €2 fee is deducted separately from the senders account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Currency Conversion Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
For cross-currency transfers, the transfer amount is calculated based on exchange rates.

Comment:
Example: €100 sent from Europe is converted to $108 for the recipient based on the current FX rate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount depends on certain conditions or limits.

Comment:
Example: Maximum daily transfer limit = €1,000; if balance > €1,000, only €1,000 is sent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dynamic Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The transfer amount may fluctuate based on market conditions or partner pricing.

Comment:
Example: Remittance sent via a payment platform that adjusts the amount based on real-time FX or fees.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hybrid Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A combination of multiple calculation approaches.

Comment:
Example: Base transfer amount + percentage of balance + conditional fee adjustments.
